overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character traversing Night City during golden hour. The character moves from a shaded covered walkway, crosses a busy street, runs along a graffiti-lined sidewalk, and ascends monumental stairs in an open plaza, showcasing the game's futuristic cyberpunk architecture and dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive building overhang

events.description: exiting shaded covered walkway and approaching sunlit crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade area toward the street intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: dark brutalist concrete structure casting deep shadows over the walkway
futuristic elevated highway structure with multiple levels and support beams
illuminated digital screen displaying BROSEPH BREWING CO advertisement
rusted metal barrier separating sidewalk from street level
tall palm trees visible beyond the building edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shaded covered walkway beneath a massive concrete building. The environment is dimly lit with natural light filtering from the right, while futuristic skyscrapers and an elevated highway ramp are visible ahead. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the character approaches a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with marked pedestrian stripes

events.description: stepping onto marked crosswalk with green WALK signage painted on asphalt
vehicles passing by on the right side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with green WALK text
modern glass facade building reflecting the golden hour sunlight
street sign indicating Canal St mounted on a pole
large digital advertisement screen displaying BLUNTERS branding

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into bright golden hour sunlight, crossing a wide street at a marked crosswalk. The glass building on the left reflects the warm light while vehicles pass on the right. The character moves with the flow of pedestrians across the striped crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside graffiti-covered wall with construction barriers

events.description: turning right onto sidewalk adjacent to wall with large asian character graffiti
transitioning from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking then running along the sidewalk past construction barriers and graffiti art

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright purple shirt and red cap walking toward camera

entered.detail: concrete wall with large red and white asian character graffiti reading tiger leopard
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a sidewalk running alongside a distinctive graffiti-covered wall featuring large asian characters. Construction barriers line the right side of the path. After walking initially, the character breaks into a run, passing other pedestrians as the elevated highway structure remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with monumental stairs and holographic advertisements

events.description: entering open plaza area with wide concrete steps visible ahead
beginning to ascend the wide concrete stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: running through the open plaza and ascending the monumental stairs toward a glowing holographic advertisement

entered.detail: wide open concrete plaza with scattered debris and markings
broad concrete staircase leading up to the next level
glowing green holographic display at the top of the stairs
multi-story residential building with balconies and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character runs into a spacious open plaza surrounded by residential buildings and massive infrastructure. The environment opens up significantly with fewer pedestrians. The character approaches and ascends a wide set of concrete stairs toward a glowing green holographic advertisement at the top, with the elevated highway structure now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, sheltered urban corridor into a vast, sun-drenched plaza. It begins within a shaded covered walkway beneath a massive concrete building, where natural light filters in from the side as the character approaches a busy crosswalk. As the character emerges from the shade, the environment shifts into bright golden hour sunlight, reflecting off glass buildings while the camera follows the character across a wide, striped street. The scene then transitions onto a sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and construction barriers, where the character breaks into a run beneath the looming structure of an elevated highway. Finally, the space opens up into a spacious plaza, with the camera ascending a wide set of concrete stairs toward a glowing green holographic advertisement.
